2604.26919.title: Causal Learning with Neural Assemblies
2604.26919.paper_summary: Can Neural Assemblies -- groups of neurons that fire together and strengthen through co-activation -- learn the direction of causal influence between variables? While established as a computationally general substrate for classification, parsing, and planning, neural assemblies have not yet been shown to internalize causal directionality. We demonstrate that the inherent operations of neural assemblies -- projection, local plasticity control, and sparse winner selection -- are sufficient for directional learning. We introduce DIRECT (DIRectional Edge Coupling/Training), a mechanism that co-activates source and target assemblies under an adaptive gain schedule to internalize directed relations. Unlike backpropagation-based methods, DIRECT relies solely on local plasticity, making the resulting causal claims auditable at the mechanism level. Our findings are verified through a dual-readout validation strategy: (i) synaptic-strength asymmetry, measuring the emergent weight gap between forward and reverse links, and (ii) functional propagation overlap, quantifying the reliability of directional signal flow. Across multiple domains, the framework achieves perfect structural recovery under a supervised, known-structure setting. These results establish neural assemblies as an auditable bridge between biologically plausible dynamics and formal causal models, offering an "explainable by design" framework where causal claims are traceable to specific neural winners and synaptic asymmetries.
2604.26919.paper_summary_zh: 神經集合——一組共同激發並通過共同激活增強的神經元——能學習變數之間的因果影響方向嗎？雖然已被確立為分類、解析和規劃的計算通用基礎，但尚未顯示神經集合能內化因果方向性。我們證明了神經集合的固有操作——投影、本地可塑性控制和稀疏獲勝者選擇——足以進行方向性學習。我們介紹了DIRECT（DIRectional Edge Coupling/Training），這是一種在自適應增益計劃下共同激活源和目標集合的機制，以內化有向關係。與基於反向傳播的方法不同，DIRECT完全依賴於本地可塑性，使得所產生的因果主張在機制層面上可審計。我們的發現通過雙讀出驗證策略得到驗證：（i）突觸強度不對稱，測量前向和反向連接之間的突現權重差距，以及（ii）功能傳播重疊，量化方向性信號流的可靠性。在多個領域中，該框架在監督的已知結構設置下實現了完美的結構恢復。這些結果確立了神經集合作為生物學上合理的動態與正式因果模型之間的可審計橋樑，提供了一個“設計上可解釋”的框架，其中因果主張可追溯到特定的神經獲勝者和突觸不對稱性。
2604.26919.author: Evangelia Kopadi et.al.
